System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource [5.0.0](https://www.nuget.org/packages/System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource/5.0.0)
--------------------

Used by: Core internal

Target frameworks: net10.0, net481, net8.0, net9.0

License: [MIT](../../../../licenses/mit) 

- package license: [MIT](https://licenses.nuget.org/MIT) 
- repository license: [MIT](git://github.com/dotnet/runtime) 
- project license: [MIT](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime) 

Description
-----------
Provides Classes that allow you to decouple code logging rich (unserializable) diagnostics/telemetry (e.g. framework) from code that consumes it (e.g. tools)

Commonly Used Types:
System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticListener
System.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSource
 
When using NuGet 3.x this package requires at least version 3.4.
